ns0:entry.ns0:title: Filoppi/Luma-Framework
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Filoppi/Luma-Framework
Language: c
Luma is DX11 games modding framework based on the ReShade Addon system. Multiple mods are currently included, the biggest one being Prey (2017), which refactors its post processing rendering phase (e.g. adding HDR support, DLSS). Mod list here: https://github.com/Filoppi/Luma-Framework/wiki

ns0:entry.ns0:title: HermannBjorgvin/Clawdmeter
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/HermannBjorgvin/Clawdmeter
Language: c
ESP32 desk dashboard that shows Claude Code usage

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ImageMagick/ImageMagick
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ImageMagick/ImageMagick
Language: c
ImageMagick is a free, open-source software suite for creating, editing, converting, and displaying images. It supports 200+ formats and offers powerful command-line tools and APIs for automation, scripting, and integration across platforms.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: InterceptSuite/ProxyBridge
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/InterceptSuite/ProxyBridge
Language: c
Proxifier Alternative to redirect any Windows/MacOS/Linux TCP and UDP traffic to HTTP/Socks5 proxy

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Mbed-TLS/mbedtls
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Mbed-TLS/mbedtls
Language: c
An open source, portable, easy to use, readable and flexible TLS library, and reference implementation of the PSA Cryptography API. Releases are on a varying cadence, typically around 3 - 6 months between releases.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: OpenVPN/openvpn
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/OpenVPN/openvpn
Language: c
OpenVPN is an open source VPN daemon

ns0:entry.ns0:title: V4bel/dirtyfrag
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/V4bel/dirtyfrag
Language: c

ns0:entry.ns0:title: betaflight/betaflight
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/betaflight/betaflight
Language: c
Open Source Flight Controller Firmware

ns0:entry.ns0:title: coredevices/PebbleOS
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/coredevices/PebbleOS
Language: c

ns0:entry.ns0:title: freebsd/freebsd-src
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-src
Language: c
The FreeBSD src tree publish-only repository. Experimenting with 'simple' pull requests....

ns0:entry.ns0:title: lz4/lz4
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/lz4/lz4
Language: c
Extremely Fast Compression algorithm

ns0:entry.ns0:title: madler/zlib
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/madler/zlib
Language: c
A massively spiffy yet delicately unobtrusive compression library.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mcu-tools/mcuboot
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mcu-tools/mcuboot
Language: c
Secure boot for 32-bit Microcontrollers!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/mimalloc
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/mimalloc
Language: c
mimalloc is a compact general purpose allocator with excellent performance.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nrfconnect/sdk-nrf
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nrfconnect/sdk-nrf
Language: c
nRF Connect SDK main repository

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pgvector/pgvector
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pgvector/pgvector
Language: c
Open-source vector similarity search for Postgres

ns0:entry.ns0:title: redis/redis
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/redis/redis
Language: c
For developers, who are building real-time data-driven applications, Redis is the preferred, fastest, and most feature-rich cache, data structure server, and document and vector query engine.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: signalwire/freeswitch
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/signalwire/freeswitch
Language: c
FreeSWITCH is a Software Defined Telecom Stack enabling the digital transformation from proprietary telecom switches to a versatile software implementation that runs on any commodity hardware. From a Raspberry PI to a multi-core server, FreeSWITCH can unlock the telecommunications potential of any device.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: xiph/opus
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/xiph/opus
Language: c
Modern audio compression for the internet.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: xiph/rnnoise
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/xiph/rnnoise
Language: c
Recurrent neural network for audio noise reduction
